calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-304 promote-to-active behavioural conditioned-inhibition falsifier (SD-065 cue + SD-066 centered readout)
items.note: MECH-304 promote-to-active BEHAVIOURAL falsifier (the pre-registered claims.yaml 'Falsifiable:' signature). Gated on SD-065 (safety cue channel, ree-v3 5e03aa6) + SD-066 (centered/common-mode-invariant store readout, safety_store_centered=True, ree-v3 0721dcb): the raw-cosine store gate saturates on the z_world common-mode (SD-008) and self-routes substrate_ceiling; SD-066 subtracts a slow EMA baseline so the ~0.006-cosine cue residual resolves. Mechanistic beta_gate.elevate() induction (option i) bypasses the GAP-I competence wall; urgency-interrupt disabled + comparator reset + no goal isolate the safety gate. 4 arms x 6 seeds: A store_on+cue / B store_off+cue (ablation) / C store_on+nocue (cue-specificity) / D store_off+terrain_on (MECH-303 sparing). DV1 conditioned inhibition = release_A - release_B >= 0.34 AND release_A - release_C >= 0.34 (store-necessity AND cue-specificity). DV2 dissociation = MECH-303 contextual release_D >= 0.34 (spared under MECH-304 ablation). Readiness positive control (arm A cue, NO threat release, same statistic DV1 routes on) >= 0.34 + n_valid_seeds >= 4 else substrate_not_ready_requeue/non_contributory. Inline Mac validation PASS/supports (DV1 gaps 0.83 store / 0.67 cue; DV2 1.0; readiness met 5 seeds; non_degenerate). A PASS gates MECH-304 provisional->active. OFF arm minted in-line (driver-bound; factored baseline module deferred, SD-065/066 first-of-lineage in-flux). Re-derive brake: 0 MECH-304 substrate_ceiling autopsies. GOV-REUSE-1: 759 is representation-level AUC, not the behavioural release readout on this substrate -> not recoverable, run. claim_ids=[MECH-304]; experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 leg H-mode (policy-control axis): critic-utility explore/exploit gate vs fixed-RND, z_world + raw 5x5, diagnostic
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 leg 4/5 (policy-control axis). Tests whether a critic-utility-gated explore/exploit mode scalar (Aston-Jones&Cohen 2005 / Daw 2006) that anneals entropy + the RND coefficient toward greedy exploitation IMPROVES CONSOLIDATION over a fixed-coefficient RND arm run SAME-RUN. The TREATMENT is the gate (a meta-controller OVER exploration), NOT more novelty -> NOT a power-bump; RND is the fixed comparator. Load-bearing DV = mode arm beats fixed-RND by >= 1.0 resource/ep. BOTH z_world + raw as separate reuse-eligible arms; also banks reuse-eligible RND arms on BOTH reps (751 ran z_world RND only). DIAGNOSTIC -> excluded from scoring; routes to /failure-autopsy. MECH-457 candidate/v3_pending. Re-derive brake does NOT fire. Cloud-pinned for reuse-eligible mints. Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-14.

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 PAIR H-credit x H-return (additivity cell): credit + return + pair vs sparse, z_world + raw 5x5, diagnostic
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 leg 5/5, the mandated PAIR cell (user directive 2026-07-14: the gap has two plausibly-ADDITIVE halves -- credit-propagation H-credit + frontier-return H-return). Runs H-credit alone, H-return alone, AND the pair SAME-RUN on both reps so additivity/complementarity is directly READABLE, not inferred. Load-bearing DV = pair exceeds the better single by >= 1.0 resource/ep (complementarity), strict majority seeds, clears floor. BOTH z_world + raw as separate reuse-eligible arms; sparse baseline same-run both reps. DIAGNOSTIC -> excluded from scoring; routes to /failure-autopsy. MECH-457 candidate/v3_pending. Re-derive brake does NOT fire. Cloud-pinned for reuse-eligible mints. Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-14.
